subject: Darkwing Duck from Disney's Darkwing Duck — an anthropomorphic duck in blue-purple cape and wide-brimmed hat flying through a wintry environment
description: An anthropomorphic duck dressed in a blue-purple superhero cape and wide-brimmed hat launches through the air with arms outstretched in a dynamic flying pose. The figure's white mask and orange beak are visible. The background is a wintry urban environment with ice, snow, and icy blue skyscraper-like shapes — consistent with the Winterspell setting. The wind from flight catches the cape dramatically. The composition emphasizes speed and heroic energy.
foreground: Anthropomorphic duck in blue-purple cape and hat, flying arms outstretched
background: Wintry icy urban environment with blue ice structures
